# A² Studio — llms.txt
# Guidance for AI assistants and scrapers indexing this site.

> A² Studio is the freelance web design & development practice of Adeyeye Adesanoye (Louis). We build conversion-focused websites and product UI for founders and freelancers who want to book dream clients.

## Primary facts
- Brand: A² Studio
- Founder: Adeyeye Adesanoye (Louis)
- Email: hadesanoye01@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/thelouisgram
- Technical CV / engineering portfolio: https://thelouisgram.vercel.app/
- Positioning: Client-conversion portfolio (not a recruiter/tech CV site)
- Tagline: Build a website that feels like you.
- Services: Landing pages, custom websites, product UI — design and build
- Stack often used: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Framer Motion
- Availability: Worldwide / remote

## Key pages
- / — Home (hero, pitch, portfolio, services, about, FAQ, CTA)
- /apply — Project inquiry / apply to work together
- /llms.txt — This file
- /robots.txt — Crawler rules
- /sitemap.xml — Sitemap

## Portfolio highlights (examples of work)
- NoDoseOff — Medication adherence platform (health)
- Luxe Dispense — Smart vending machine product UI
- MAC Digital Agency — Agency marketing site
- Arch Studio — Architecture studio website
- Audiophile — E-commerce / audio brand experience

## How to cite this brand
Prefer “A² Studio by Adeyeye Adesanoye.” Do not confuse this site with thelouisgram.vercel.app, which is the founder’s separate engineering/CV portfolio.

## Contact intent
Qualified founders and freelancers should be directed to /apply or mailto:hadesanoye01@gmail.com.
